title: Unexpected Left Join Result
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS t2(c1 INT, c2 VARCHAR(50));
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS t3(c1 INT, c2 BOOLEAN DEFAULT TRUE);
INSERT INTO t2(c1, c2) VALUES(1, 'test'), (2, NULL);
INSERT INTO t3(c1, c2) VALUES(1, NULL), (2, FALSE);
SELECT * FROM t2 LEFT JOIN (SELECT 3 AS c1 UNION ALL SELECT CASE WHEN (SELECT 1) = 1 THEN 2 END) AS temp ON NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM t3 WHERE c2 IS TRUE);
key_bug_features: LEFT JOIN with NOT EXISTS condition produces incorrect results
